name: simple-invoice
description: SimpleInvoice — full-stack invoicing app (React + NestJS + PostgreSQL)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace backend && npm run test --workspace frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace backend && npm run lint --workspace frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace backend && npm run typecheck --workspace frontend

//prisma: Prisma CLI loads .env from the working directory. These scripts run from the repo ROOT (via --schema) so the root .env is picked up; running them inside the backend workspace would look for backend/.env and fail with P1012.
